purpose: Define a safe future personalization schema for subscriber daily guidance without enabling Auth, subscription, Supabase reads/writes, premium output, or live personalized guidance.

identity_context.notes: Only after Auth/subscription activation and explicit consent.

birth_context.notes: Sensitive context. Must not be collected or processed before consent, privacy policy, and secure storage.

daily_context.notes: May be derived from reviewed D01-D06 engines after future activation.

strict_output_rules: Do not present guidance as deterministic prediction.
Do not provide medical, legal, financial or crisis advice as spiritual guidance.
Do not generate unreviewed mantra text.
Do not expose birth details or subscriber profile publicly.
Do not unlock premium guidance only on login; subscription/entitlement must be checked in a later activation stage.
guardrails: Do not enable subscriber guidance in this stage.
Do not enable premium guidance in this stage.
Do not enable Auth in frontend code.
